name: swarmy-skillz
displayName: Swarmy Skillz — AI Swarm Intelligence for Prediction Markets
description: Thousands of AI agents debate any question on simulated social media, then compare crowd consensus against live Polymarket, Kalshi, and Manifold odds to find betting edges.

skills.name: swarm-intelligence
skills.description: Run AI swarm simulations to predict outcomes on any question

skills.name: market-polymarket
skills.description: Read Polymarket prediction market odds and calculate edge vs swarm consensus

skills.name: market-kalshi
skills.description: Read Kalshi (CFTC-regulated) prediction market odds and calculate edge vs swarm consensus

skills.name: market-manifold
skills.description: Read Manifold Markets odds and calculate edge vs swarm consensus
